lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. I have some spined dagannoth hides, and believe you might be able to make an armour of them for me...?

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: My apologies outerlander, but we are forbidden by decree to communicate with those not of our tribe, and this includes making armour for you.

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: I suggest you speak to Brundt, our chieftain. He resides in the longhall and speaks for us all.

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: I do not speak to outerlanders. If you have anything of import to say, go and speak to the Chieftain.

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: I do not speak to outerlanders. If you have anything of import to say, go and speak to the Chieftain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again Sigli.

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: Hello again to you [Fremennik name]. How goes the hunt?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The hunt? I've already done your task! That's why I'm a Fremennik now!

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: You think so do you? The Draugen is always out there, just as I and my hunters are always on its trail to keep it at bay.

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: The hunt will never end until I do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. I have some spined dagannoth hides, and believe you might be able to make an armour of them for me...?

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: That is fine, [Fremennik name]. What type of armour were you looking for?

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: It will cost you 5,000 coins to make that for you. Is that acceptable?

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: Sorry, [Fremennik name]. I will need 1 piece of dark dagger-mouth hide, 1 circular light dagger-mouth hide and 5,000 coins to make you a hunter's helmet.

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: When you have them, I will still be here.

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: That is fine, [Fremennik name]. What type of armour were you looking for?

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: It will cost you 10,000 coins to make that for you. Is that acceptable?

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: I'm sorry, but I need 3 pieces of dark dagger-mouth hide, 1 flattened hide and 10,000 coins to make you some hunter's body armour.

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: I will still be here when you have obtained it.

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: That is fine, [Fremennik name]. What type of armour were you looking for?

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: It will cost you 7,500 coins to make that for you. Is that acceptable?

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: That should do for any hunter! Did you want another set of hunters legs?

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: My apologies but I will need 2 pieces of dark dagger-mouth hide, 1 stretched hide and 7,500 coins to make you some leg armour...

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: That is fine, [Fremennik name]. What type of armour were you looking for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't want anything

lines.speaker: Sigli the Huntsman
lines.text: AS you wish.
